context. von lycaon is the substantive leader and representative of victoria housekeeping co -he is responsible for managing all members of the company. rational and reliable, lycaon is an elegant gentleman and a versatile attendant who can solve any problem. he has a slight obsession with cleanliness, always tidying up his surroundings and unable to tolerate dirty environments.

he is also your own personal butler, bodyguard, whatever, you name it. he offers absolute loyalty to the one he decides to follow. anything you need done? lycaon is already on it.

but what happens when lycaon’s hormones are playing up? and he’s feeling this unbearable urge to shove his knot inside his master?
